modules.name: color
modules.desc:
The colors module is used for [color mode conversion / color space conversion / color component synthesis and decomposition], etc.
It also includes some color-related utilities, such as [luminance calculation / similarity comparison], etc.

The colors module works together with the images module to provide more image and color related functionality.

modules.name: color_representation
modules.desc:
AutoJs6 supports the following ways to represent a color:

  • Color Code (ColorHex)
    • Literals
      • #RGB (e.g. #F00 represents red, equivalent to #FF0000)
      • #RRGGBB (e.g. #FF0000 represents red)
      • #AARRGGBB (e.g. #80FF0000 represents semi-transparent red)
    • Methods
      • colors.toHex (e.g. colors.toHex(0xFF0000) returns the color string for red, result is #FF0000)
      • colors.toFullHex (e.g. colors.toFullHex(0xFF0000) returns the full color string for red, result is #FFFF0000)
      • ... ...
  • Color Integer (ColorInt)
    • Literals
      • 0xAARRGGBB (e.g. 0x8000FF00 within Java's Integer range represents semi-transparent green)
    • Methods
      • colors.rgb (e.g. colors.rgb(255, 0, 0) represents red)
      • colors.argb (e.g. colors.argb(128, 255, 0, 0) represents semi-transparent red)
      • colors.rgba (e.g. colors.rgba(255, 0, 0, 128) represents semi-transparent red)
      • colors.hsv (e.g. colors.hsv(0, 1, 1) represents red)
      • colors.hsva (e.g. colors.rgba(0, 1, 1, 0.5) represents semi-transparent red)
      • colors.hsl (e.g. colors.hsl(0, 1, 0.5) represents red)
      • colors.hsla (e.g. colors.hsl(0, 1, 0.5, 0.5) represents semi-transparent red)
      • colors.toInt (e.g. colors.toInt('#FF0000') returns the color integer for red, result is -65536)
      • ... ...
    • Constants
      • colors.android.RED (Red color integer from the Android Color List)
      • colors.android.BLACK (Black color integer from the Android Color List)
      • ... ...
      • colors.css.RED (Red color integer from the CSS Color List)
      • colors.css.BLACK (Black color integer from the CSS Color List)
      • ... ...
      • colors.web.RED (Red color integer from the Web Color List)
      • colors.web.BLACK (Black color integer from the Web Color List)
      • ... ...
      • colors.material.ORANGE (Orange color integer from the Material Color List)
      • colors.material.ORANGE_300 (Orange color integer with shade 300 from the Material Color List)
      • ... ...
      • colors.RED (Red color integer from the Combined Color List)
      • colors.BLACK (Black color integer from the Combined Color List)
      • colors.ORANGE (Orange color integer from the Combined Color List)
      • ... ...
  • Color Components Array (ColorComponents)
    • Methods
      • colors.toRgb (Color components array [R, G, B])
      • colors.toRgba (Color components array [R, G, B, A])
      • colors.toArgb (Color components array [A, R, G, B])
      • colors.toHsv (Color components array [H, S, V])
      • colors.toHsva (Color components array [H, S, V, A])
      • colors.toHsl (Color components array [H, S, L])
      • colors.toHsla (Color components array [H, S, L, A])
      • ... ...
  • Color Name (ColorName)
    • Constants
      • "red" (red)
      • "black" (black)
      • "orange" (orange)
      • ... ...

modules.name: black_and_0
modules.desc:
Special attention: The color string for black is #000000, which is the shorthand form of the full color string #FF000000. Its ARGB components are represented as argb(255, 0, 0, 0).

Therefore, the color integer for black is not 0, but -16777216.

The color integer 0 corresponds to fully transparent color, i.e. #00000000, with ARGB components argb(0, 0, 0, 0).

colors

methods.name: toInt
methods.desc:
6.2.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { ColorInt } - Color integer

Converts the color parameter to a color integer (ColorInt).

/* ColorHex - 颜色代码. */
colors.toInt('#CC5500'); // -3386112
colors.toInt('#C50'); // -3386112
colors.toInt('#FFCC5500'); // -3386112

/* ColorInt - 颜色整数. */
colors.toInt(0xFFCC5500); // -3386112
colors.toInt(colors.web.BURNT_ORANGE); // -3386112

/* ColorName - 颜色名称. */
colors.toInt('BURNT_ORANGE'); // -3386112
colors.toInt('burnt-orange'); // -3386112

methods.name: toHex
methods.desc:
6.2.0 Overload 1/3

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { ColorHex } - Color code

Converts the color parameter to a color code (ColorHex).

/* ColorHex - Color code. */
colors.toHex('#CC5500'); // #CC5500
colors.toHex('#C50'); // #CC5500
colors.toHex('#DECC5500'); // #DECC5500
colors.toHex('#FFCC5500'); /* #CC5500, A (alpha) component omitted. */

/* ColorInt - Color integer. */
colors.toHex(0xFFCC5500); // #CC5500
colors.toHex(colors.web.BURNT_ORANGE); // #CC5500

/* ColorName - Color name. */
colors.toHex('BURNT_ORANGE'); // #CC5500
colors.toHex('burnt-orange'); // #CC5500

When the A (alpha) component is 100% (255/255;100/100), FF is automatically omitted.
For example, #FFC0C0C0 will be automatically converted to #C0C0C0. This method is equivalent to toHex(color, 'auto').

methods.name: toHex
methods.desc:
6.2.0 Overload 2/3

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • [ alpha = 'auto' ] { boolean | 'keep' | 'none' | 'auto' } - A (alpha) component parameter
  • returns { ColorHex } - Color code

Converts the color parameter to a color code (ColorHex) and determines the display state of the A (alpha) component in the color code according to the alpha parameter.

A (alpha) component parameter values:

Value Meaning Default
'keep' / true Force display of A component, regardless of whether A is 0xFF
'none' / false Force removal of A component, keep only R / G / B components
'auto' Automatically decide display state based on whether A is 0xFF √ 
let cA = '#AAC0C0C0';
let cB = '#FFC0C0C0';
let cC = '#C0C0C0';

colors.toHex(cA, 'auto'); /* #AAC0C0C0, 'auto' parameter can be omitted. */
colors.toHex(cB, 'auto'); /* #C0C0C0, 'auto' parameter can be omitted. */
colors.toHex(cC, 'auto'); /* #C0C0C0, 'auto' parameter can be omitted. */

/* cA discards A component. */
colors.toHex(cA, false); // #C0C0C0
colors.toHex(cA, 'none'); /* Same as above. */

/* cB keeps A component. */
colors.toHex(cB, true); // #FFC0C0C0
colors.toHex(cB, 'keep'); /* Same as above. */

/* cC forces display of A component. */
colors.toHex(cC, true); // #FFC0C0C0
colors.toHex(cC, 'keep'); /* Same as above. */

methods.name: toHex
methods.desc:
6.2.0 Overload 3/3

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • length { 8 | 6 | 3 } - Hex code length parameter
  • returns { ColorHex } - Color code

Converts the color parameter to a color code (ColorHex) and determines the display format of the color code according to the length parameter.

Hex code length parameter values:

Value Meaning
8 Force display of A component, result format #AARRGGBB
6 Force removal of A component, result format #RRGGBB
3 Force removal of A component, result format #RGB 
let cA = '#AA9966CC';
let cB = '#FF9966CC';
let cC = '#9966CC';
let cD = '#FAEBD7';

/* Convert to 8-character color code, force keep A component. */
colors.toHex(cA, 8); // #AA9966CC
colors.toHex(cB, 8); // #FF9966CC
colors.toHex(cC, 8); // #FF9966CC
colors.toHex(cD, 8); // #FFFAEBD7

/* Convert to 6-character color code, force remove A component. */
colors.toHex(cA, 6); // #9966CC
colors.toHex(cB, 6); // #9966CC
colors.toHex(cC, 6); // #9966CC
colors.toHex(cD, 6); // #FAEBD7

/* Convert to 3-character color code, force remove A component. */
colors.toHex(cA, 3); // #96C
colors.toHex(cB, 3); // #96C
colors.toHex(cC, 3); // #96C
colors.toHex(cD, 3); /* Throws an exception. */

methods.name: toFullHex
methods.desc:
6.2.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { ColorHex } - Full form of the color code

Forces conversion of the color parameter to the full form of color code (ColorHex) (#AARRGGBB).

This method is an alias for colors.toHex(color, 8).

colors.toHex('#CC5500'); // #CC5500
colors.toFullHex('#CC5500'); // #FFCC5500

methods.name: build
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload [1-2]/4

  • [ color = Colors.BLACK ] { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { Color } - Color instance

Builds a Color instance, equivalent to new Color(color?) or Color(color?).

colors.build('dark-orange') /* Build Color instance with dark orange */
    .setAlpha(0.85) /* Set alpha to 85%. */
    .removeBlue() /* Remove B (blue) component. */
    .toHex(); // #D9FF8C00

/* Build empty Color instance, set HSLA components and convert to Hex code. */
colors.build().setHsla(0.25, 0.8, 0.64, 0.9).toHex(); // #E6A3ED5A

methods.name: build
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload [3-4]/4

  • red { ColorComponent } - Color component - R (red)
  • green { ColorComponent } - Color component - G (green)
  • blue { ColorComponent } - Color component - B (blue)
  • [ alpha = 1 ] { ColorComponent } - Color component - A (alpha)
  • returns { ColorInt }

Builds a Color instance, equivalent to new Color(red, green, blue, alpha?).

colors.build(120, 60, 240).setAlpha(0.85).toHex(); // #D9783CF0
colors.build(120, 60, 240, 0.85).toHex(); /* Same as above. */
colors.build().setRgba(120, 60, 240, 0.85).toHex(); /* Same as above. */

methods.name: summary
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { string } - Color summary

Gets a color summary.

The format is hex($HEX), rgba($R,$G,$B/$A), int($INT).

The A (alpha) component is displayed in the 0..1 range, with at least one decimal place and at most two:

Component Value Displayed Value
0 0.0
1 1.0
0.64 0.64
128 0.5
255 1.0
100 0.39

Examples:

// hex(#009688), rgba(0,150,136/1.0), int(-16738680)
colors.summary('#009688');

// hex(#BE009688), rgba(0,150,136/0.75), int(-1107257720)
colors.summary('#BE009688');

// hex(#FF0000), rgba(255,0,0/1.0), int(-65536)
colors.summary('red');

// hex(#6400008B), rgba(0,0,139/0.39), int(1677721739)
colors.build('dark-blue').setAlpha(100).summary();

methods.name: parseColor
methods.desc:
Converts the color parameter to a color integer (ColorInt).

Similar to toInt, but the accepted parameter range is relatively narrower and the type/value requirements are stricter.
The color parameter for parseColor only supports 6-digit and 8-digit color codes and a limited set of color names.

Supported color names (case-insensitive):

'aqua', 'black', 'blue', 'cyan', 'darkgray', 'darkgrey',

'fuchsia', 'gray', 'green', 'grey', 'lightgray',

'lightgrey', 'lime', 'magenta', 'maroon', 'navy', 'olive',

'purple', 'red', 'silver', 'teal', 'white', 'yellow'`.

The table below compares some results between toInt and parseColor:

Parameter toInt parseColor
'blue' -16776961 -16776961
'burnt-orange' -3386112 # throws error #
'#FFCC5500' -3386112 -3386112
'#CC5500' -3386112 -3386112
'#C50' -3386112 # throws error #
0xFFCC5500 -3386112 # throws error #
colors.web.BURNT_ORANGE -3386112 # throws error #

Unless multi-version compatibility is required, it is recommended to always use toInt instead of parseColor.

methods.name: toString
methods.desc:
[6.2.0] Overload 1/3

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { ColorHex } - Color code

Converts the color parameter to a color code (ColorHex).

Alias for toHex(color).

methods.name: toString
methods.desc:
6.2.0 Overload 2/3

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • [ alpha = 'auto' ] { boolean | 'keep' | 'none' | 'auto' } - A (alpha) component parameter
  • returns { ColorHex } - Color code

Converts the color parameter to a color code (ColorHex) and determines the display state of the A (alpha) component based on the alpha parameter.

Alias for toHex(color, alpha).

methods.name: toString
methods.desc:
6.2.0 Overload 3/3

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • length { 8 | 6 | 3 } - Hex code length parameter
  • returns { ColorHex } - Color code

Converts the color parameter to a color code (ColorHex) and determines the display state based on the length parameter.

Alias for toHex(color, length).

methods.name: alpha
methods.desc:
Overload 1/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the A (alpha) component of the color, range [0..255].

colors.alpha('#663399'); // 255
colors.alpha(colors.TRANSPARENT); // 0
colors.alpha('#05060708'); // 5

methods.name: alpha
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 2/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • options {{
    • [ max = 255 ]?: 1 | 255 - Maximum value of the range
  • }} - Options parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..1] | IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the A (alpha) component of the color.

The range is [0..1] (when options.max is 1) or [0..255] (when options.max is 255 or omitted).

colors.alpha('#663399', { max: 1 }); // 1
colors.alpha('#663399', { max: 255 }); // 255
colors.alpha('#663399'); /* Same as above. */

colors.alpha('#05060708', { max: 1 }); // 0.0196078431372549
colors.alpha('#05060708', { max: 255 }); // 5
colors.alpha('#05060708'); /* Same as above. */

When options.max is 1, this is equivalent to the colors.alphaDouble method.

methods.name: alphaDouble
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { Range[0..1] }

Gets the A (alpha) component of the color, range [0..1].

Equivalent to colors.alpha(color, { max: 1 }).

colors.alphaDouble('#663399'); // 1
colors.alphaDouble(colors.TRANSPARENT); // 0

colors.alphaDouble('#05060708'); // 0.0196078431372549
colors.alpha('#05060708', { max: 1 }); /* Same as above. */

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 1/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the A (alpha) component of the color, range [0..255].

Alias for colors.alpha(color).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 2/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • options {{
    • [ max = 255 ]?: 1 | 255 - Maximum value of the range
  • }} - Options parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..1] | IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the A (alpha) component of the color.

Alias for colors.alpha(color, options).

methods.name: getAlphaDouble
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { Range[0..1] }

Gets the A (alpha) component of the color, range [0..1].

Alias for colors.alphaDouble(color).

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • alpha { ColorComponent } - Color component - A (alpha)
  • returns { ColorInt }

Sets the A (alpha) component of the color and returns the new color as a color integer.

colors.toHex(colors.setAlpha('#663399', 0x80)); // #80663399
colors.toHex(colors.setAlpha('#663399', 0.5)); /* Same as above; 0.5 is interpreted as percentage (50%). */

colors.toHex(colors.setAlpha('#663399', 255)); // #FF663399
colors.toHex(colors.setAlpha('#663399', 1)); /* Same as above; 1 is interpreted as percentage (100%) by default. */

methods.name: setAlphaRelative
methods.desc:
6.3.1

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • percentage { ColorComponent } - Relative percentage
  • returns { ColorInt }

Sets a relative percentage for the A (alpha) component and returns the new color as a color integer.

If the current color's A (alpha) component is 80 and you want to set the A component to 50% of that (i.e. 40):

colors.setAlphaRelative(color, 0.5);
colors.setAlphaRelative(color, '50%'); /* Same effect as above. */

Similarly, if you want to set the A component to 1.5 times the original (i.e. 120):

colors.setAlphaRelative(color, 1.5);
colors.setAlphaRelative(color, '150%');

If the resulting value exceeds 255, it will be clamped to 255:

colors.setAlphaRelative(color, 10); /* Final A component value is 255, not 800. */

Note that if the original color's A component is 0, the A component will remain 0 no matter what relative value is set.

methods.name: removeAlpha
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { ColorInt }

Removes the A (alpha) component from the color and returns the new color as a color integer.

colors.toHex(colors.removeAlpha('#BE663399')); // #663399
colors.toHex(colors.removeAlpha('#CC5500')); // #CC5500
`

相当于 colors.setAlpha(color, 0).

methods.name: red
methods.desc:
Overload 1/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the R (red) component of the color, range [0..255].

colors.red('#663399'); // 102
colors.red(colors.TRANSPARENT); // 0
colors.red('#05060708'); // 6

methods.name: red
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 2/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • options {{
    • [ max = 255 ]?: 1 | 255 - Maximum value of the range
  • }} - Options parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..1] | IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the R (red) component of the color.

The range is [0..1] (when options.max is 1) or [0..255] (when options.max is 255 or omitted).

colors.red('#663399', { max: 1 }); // 0.4
colors.red('#663399', { max: 255 }); // 102
colors.red('#663399'); /* Same as above. */

When options.max is 1, this is equivalent to the colors.redDouble method.

methods.name: redDouble
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { Range[0..1] }

Gets the R (red) component of the color, range [0..1].

Equivalent to colors.red(color, { max: 1 }).

colors.redDouble('#663399'); // 0.4

methods.name: getRed
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 1/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the R (red) component of the color, range [0..255].

Alias for colors.red(color).

methods.name: getRed
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 2/2

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • options {{
    • [ max = 255 ]?: 1 | 255 - Maximum value of the range
  • }} - Options parameter
  • returns { IntRange[0..1] | IntRange[0..255] }

Gets the R (red) component of the color.

Alias for colors.red(color, options).

methods.name: getRedDouble
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • returns { Range[0..1] }

Gets the R (red) component of the color, range [0..1].

Alias for colors.redDouble(color).

methods.name: setRed
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • red { ColorComponent } - Color component - R (red)
  • returns { ColorInt }

Sets the R (red) component of the color and returns the new color as a color integer.

colors.toHex(colors.setRed('#663399', 0x80)); // #803399
colors.toHex(colors.setRed('#663399', 0.5)); /* Same as above; 0.5 is interpreted as percentage (50%). */

colors.toHex(colors.setRed('#663399', 255)); // #FF3399
colors.toHex(colors.setRed('#663399', 1)); /* #013399 — different from above. 1 is interpreted as integer component by default, not 100%. */

methods.name: setRedRelative
methods.desc:
6.3.1

  • color { OmniColor } - Color parameter
  • percentage { ColorComponent } - Relative percentage
  • returns { ColorInt }

Sets a relative percentage for the R (red) component and returns the new color as a color integer.

If the current color's R (red) component is 80 and you want to set the R component to 50% of that (i.e. 40):

colors.setRedRelative(color, 0.5);
colors.setRedRelative(color, '50%'); /* Same effect as above. */

Similarly, if you want to set the R component to 1.5 times the original (i.e. 120):

colors.setRedRelative(color, 1.5);
colors.setRedRelative(color, '150%');

当设置的相对量超过 255 时, 将以 255 为最终值:

colors.setRedRelative(color, 10); /* R 分量最终值为 255, 而非 800. */

特别地, 当原本颜色的 R 分量为 0 时, 无论如何设置相对量, R 分量均保持 0 值.

methods.name: removeRed
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • returns { ColorInt }

去除颜色的 R (red) 分量, 返回新颜色的颜色整数.

colors.toHex(colors.removeRed('#BE663399')); // #BE003399
colors.toHex(colors.removeRed('#CC5500')); // #005500
`

相当于 colors.setRed(color, 0).

methods.name: green
methods.desc:
Overload 1/2

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • returns { IntRange[0..255] }

获取颜色的 G (green) 分量, 取值范围 [0..255].

colors.green('#663399'); // 51
colors.green(colors.TRANSPARENT); // 0
colors.green('#05060708'); // 7

methods.name: green
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 2/2

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • options {{
    • [ max = 255 ]?: 1 | 255 - 范围最大值
  • }} - 选项参数
  • returns { IntRange[0..1] | IntRange[0..255] }

获取颜色的 G (green) 分量.

取值范围 [0..1] (options.max 为 1) 或 [0..255] (options.max 为 255 或不指定).

colors.green('#663399', { max: 1 }); // 0.2
colors.green('#663399', { max: 255 }); // 51
colors.green('#663399'); /* 同上. */

当 options.max 为 1 时, 相当于 colors.greenDouble 方法.

methods.name: greenDouble
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • returns { Range[0..1] }

获取颜色的 G (green) 分量, 取值范围 [0..1].

相当于 colors.green(color, { max: 1 }).

colors.greenDouble('#663399'); // 0.2

methods.name: getGreen
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 1/2

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • returns { IntRange[0..255] }

获取颜色的 G (green) 分量, 取值范围 [0..255].

colors.green(color) 的别名方法.

methods.name: setGreenRelative
methods.desc:
6.3.1

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • percentage { ColorComponent } - 相对百分数
  • returns { ColorInt }

针对 G (green) 分量设置其相对百分比, 返回新颜色的颜色整数.

如当前颜色 G (green) 分量为 80, 希望设置 G 分量为 50% 相对量, 即 40:

colors.setGreenRelative(color, 0.5);
colors.setGreenRelative(color, '50%'); /* 效果同上. */

同样地, 如希望设置 G 分量为 1.5 倍相对量, 即 120:

colors.setGreenRelative(color, 1.5);
colors.setGreenRelative(color, '150%');

当设置的相对量超过 255 时, 将以 255 为最终值:

colors.setGreenRelative(color, 10); /* G 分量最终值为 255, 而非 800. */

特别地, 当原本颜色的 G 分量为 0 时, 无论如何设置相对量, G 分量均保持 0 值.

methods.name: getGreen
methods.desc:
6.3.0 Overload 2/2

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • options {{
    • [ max = 255 ]?: 1 | 255 - 范围最大值
  • }} - 选项参数
  • returns { IntRange[0..1] | IntRange[0..255] }

获取颜色的 G (green) 分量.

colors.green(color, options) 的别名方法.

methods.name: getGreenDouble
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • returns { Range[0..1] }

获取颜色的 G (green) 分量, 取值范围 [0..1].

colors.greenDouble(color) 的别名方法.

methods.name: setGreen
methods.desc:
6.3.0

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • green { ColorComponent } - 颜色分量 - G (green)
  • returns { ColorInt }

methods.desc:
6.3.1

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • percentage { ColorComponent } - 相对百分数
  • returns { ColorInt }

针对 B (blue) 分量设置其相对百分比, 返回新颜色的颜色整数.

如当前颜色 B (blue) 分量为 80, 希望设置 B 分量为 50% 相对量, 即 40:

colors.setBlueRelative(color, 0.5);
colors.setBlueRelative(color, '50%'); /* 效果同上. */

同样地, 如希望设置 B 分量为 1.5 倍相对量, 即 120:

colors.setBlueRelative(color, 1.5);
colors.setBlueRelative(color, '150%');

当设置的相对量超过 255 时, 将以 255 为最终值:

colors.setBlueRelative(color, 10); /* B 分量最终值为 255, 而非 800. */

特别地, 当原本颜色的 B 分量为 0 时, 无论如何设置相对量, B 分量均保持 0 值.

methods.name: isSimilar
methods.desc:
[6.2.0] Overload [1-3]/4

  • colorA { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • colorB { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • [ threshold = 4 ] { IntRange[0..255] } - 颜色匹配阈值
  • [ algorithm = 'diff' ] { ColorDetectionAlgorithm } - 颜色检测算法
  • returns { boolean } - 两个颜色是否相似

判断两个颜色是否相似.

不同阈值对结果的影响 (阈值越高, 条件越宽松, 阈值越低, 条件越严格):

colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 5); /* false, 阈值较小, 条件相对严格. */
colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 10); /* true, 阈值增大, 条件趋于宽松. */

不同 颜色检测算法 对结果的影响:

colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 9, 'rgb+'); // false
colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 9, 'diff'); // true
colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 9, 'hs'); // true

colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 8, 'rgb+'); // false
colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 8, 'diff'); // false
colors.isSimilar('orange', 'dark-orange', 8, 'hs'); // true

methods.name: isSimilar
methods.desc:
6.2.0 Overload 4/4

  • colorA { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • colorB { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • options {{
    • [ similarity ≈ 0.9843 ]?: Range[0..1] - 颜色匹配相似度
    • [ threshold = 4 ]?: IntRange[0..255] - 颜色匹配阈值
    • [ algorithm = 'diff' ]?: ColorDetectionAlgorithm - 颜色检测算法
  • }} - 选项参数
  • returns { boolean } - 两个颜色是否相似

判断两个颜色是否相似.

此方法将非必要参数集中于 options 对象中.

colors.isSimilar('#010101', '#020202', { similarity: 0.95 }); // true

methods.name: isEqual
methods.desc:
6.2.0 Overload[1-2]/2

  • colorA { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • colorB { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • [ alphaMatters = false ] { boolean } - 是否考虑 A (alpha) 分量
  • returns { boolean } - 两个颜色是否相等

判断两个颜色是否相等, 比较时由 alphaMatters 参数决定是否考虑 A (alpha) 分量:

/* Hex 代码. */
colors.isEqual('#FF0000', '#FF0000'); // true
colors.isEqual('#FF0000', '#F00'); /* 同上, 三位数简写形式. */
/* 颜色整数. */
colors.isEqual(-65536, 0xFF0000); // true
/* 颜色名称. */
colors.isEqual('red', 'RED'); /* true, 不区分大小写. */
colors.isEqual('orange', 'Orange'); /* true, 不区分大小写. */
colors.isEqual('dark-gray', 'DARK_GRAY'); /* true, 连字符与下划线均被支持. */
/* 不同类型比较. */
colors.isEqual('red', '#FF0000'); // true
colors.isEqual('orange', '#FFA500'); // true
/* A (alpha) 分量的不同情况. */
colors.isEqual('#A1FF0000', '#A2FF0000'); /* true, 默认忽略 A 分量. */
colors.isEqual('#A1FF0000', '#A2FF0000', true); /* false, 需考虑 A 分量. */

methods.name: equals
methods.desc:
DEPRECATED

  • colorA { number | string } - 颜色参数
  • colorB { number | string } - 颜色参数
  • returns { boolean } - 两个颜色是否相等 (忽略 A (alpha) 分量)

判断两个颜色是否相等, 比较时忽略 A (alpha) 分量:

/* Hex 代码. */
colors.equals('#FF0000', '#FF0000'); // true
/* 颜色整数. */
colors.equals(-65536, 0xFF0000); // true
/* 颜色名称. */
colors.equals('red', 'RED'); // true
/* 不同类型比较. */
colors.equals('red', '#FF0000'); // true
/* A (alpha) 分量将被忽略. */
colors.equals('#A1FF0000', '#A2FF0000'); // true

但以下示例将全部抛出异常:

colors.equals('orange', '#FFA500'); /* 抛出异常. */
colors.equals('dark-gray', '#444'); /* 抛出异常. */
colors.equals('#FF0000', '#F00'); /* 抛出异常. */

上述示例对于 colors.isEqual 则全部返回 true.

除非需要考虑多版本兼容, 否则建议始终使用 colors.isEqual 替代 colors.equals.

methods.name: luminance
methods.desc:
6.2.0

  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • returns { Range[0..1] } - 颜色亮度

获取颜色的 亮度 (Luminance), 取值范围 [0..1].

colors.luminance(colors.WHITE); // 1
colors.luminance(colors.BLACK); // 0
colors.luminance(colors.RED); // 0.2126
colors.luminance(colors.GREEN); // 0.7152
colors.luminance(colors.BLUE); // 0.0722
colors.luminance(colors.YELLOW); // 0.9278

参阅: W3C Wiki

methods.name: toColorStateList
methods.desc:
6.2.0

  • color { ...OmniColor[] } - 颜色参数
  • returns { android.content.res.ColorStateList }

将一个或多个颜色参数转换为 ColorStateList 实例.

colors.toColorStateList('red'); /* 包含单一颜色的 ColorStateList. */
colors.toColorStateList('red', 'green', 'orange'); /* 包含多个颜色的 ColorStateList. */

methods.name: setPaintColor
methods.desc:
6.2.0

  • paint { android.graphics.Paint } - 画笔参数
  • color { OmniColor } - 颜色参数
  • returns { void }

方法 setPaintColor 用于解决在 Android API 29 (10) [Q] 及以上系统中 Paint#setColor(color) 无法正常设置画笔颜色的问题.

let paint = new android.graphics.Paint();

/* 安卓 10 及以上系统无法正常设置颜色. */
// paint.setColor(colors.toInt('blue'));

/* 使用 colors 模块实现原始功能. */
colors.setPaintColor(paint, 'blue');

画笔无法正常设置颜色的原因, 是 Android API 29 (10) [Q] 源码中 setColor 有以下两种方法签名:

setColor(@ColorInt int color): void
setColor(@ColorLong long color): void

JavaScript 语言不区分 int 和 long, 即只有 setColor(color: number),
它会优先匹配 Java 的 setColor(@ColorLong long color): void.

ColorLong 颜色与 ColorInt 颜色不同在于, 前者包含了额外的 ColorSpace (颜色空间) 信息,
原有的 ColorInt 被当做 ColorLong 来解析, 导致颜色解析异常.

除上述 colors.setPaintColor 的方法外, 还有其他一些解决方案:

/* A. 使用 paint.setArgb 方法. */
paint.setARGB(
    colors.alpha(color),
    colors.red(color),
    colors.green(color),
    colors.blue(color),
);

/* 同上, 语法更简洁. */
paint.setARGB.apply(paint, colors.toArgb(color));

/* B. 将 ColorInt "打包" 为 ColorLong. */
paint.setColor(android.graphics.Color.pack(colors.toInt(color)));

/* C. 直接使用带 ColorSpace 信息的 ColorLong. */
paint.setColor(android.graphics.Color.pack(
    colors.redDouble(color),
    colors.greenDouble(color),
    colors.blueDouble(color),
    colors.alphaDouble(color),
    android.graphics.ColorSpace.get(android.graphics.ColorSpace.Named.SRGB),
));

colors.setPaintColor 的大致源码:

function setPaintColor(paint, color) {
    if (util.version.sdkInt >= util.versionCodes.Q) {
        paint.setARGB.apply(paint, colors.toArgb(color));
    } else {
        paint.setColor(colors.toInt(color));
    }
}

modules.name: 融合颜色
modules.desc:
为节约篇幅, 本章节仅列出了常用的部分融合颜色, 融合颜色属性直接挂载于 colors 对象上, 使用 colors.Xxx 的形式访问:

colors.toHex(colors.BLACK); /* 黑色. */
colors.toHex(colors.ORANGE); /* 橙色. */
colors.toHex(colors.PANSY); /* 三色堇紫色. */
colors.toHex(colors.ALIZARIN_CRIMSON); /* 茜红色. */
colors.toHex(colors.PURPLE_300); /* 材料紫色 (300 号). */

更多融合颜色, 参阅 融合颜色列表 小节.
